title: MinerAll
description: All the food. All the power.
body:
Designed to add food types for all minerals, such as a netherite glow berry, or iron rotten flesh. 

CURRENTLY INCLUDES:

Most gold varients of food.
Potion of decay using a golden spider eye in a brewing stand

You can use this in your modpack if you really want i dont know! 

Join the discord if you like it maybe https://discord.gg/6BhbcByydx
